description_long: This is a bronze bust of a human figure mounted on a tall, rectangular stone pedestal. The bust depicts a male figure from the chest up, with detailed facial features and short hair, rendered in a realistic style. The pedestal is made of stone and features engraved or inscribed text on the front face, which appears weathered and partially legible. The sculpture is set on a square stone base, which rests on a patch of grass and dirt, suggesting an outdoor installation. The overall appearance is that of a commemorative or memorial monument, commonly found in parks or public spaces. The materials and craftsmanship indicate durability and a sense of permanence.
description: A bronze bust of a male figure on a tall stone pedestal with engraved text, set outdoors on a grassy patch. The sculpture has a realistic style and commemorative appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the unadorned stone pedestal, with the base and surrounding grass visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the tall, smooth stone pedestal, with some shadowing on the surface.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the detailed face of the bust and the inscribed text on the pedestal, with the base and ground clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the bust and the length of the pedestal, with the stone texture and outdoor setting evident.
attribute_subject_matter: realistic human male bust on a commemorative pedestal
attribute_location_context: outdoor park or garden area with grass and natural ground cover
